languages.text: "Жаль, не все командиры выжили. Но мы запишем их имена и споем по ним песню".
"It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."
languages.original_text: "Жаль, не все командиры выжили. Но мы запишем их имена и споем по ним песню".

traits.locale_text: "It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."
"It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."
"It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."
"It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."

languages.text: “可惜不是所有指挥官都活了下来。但我们会将他们的名字铭刻下来，再唱一支歌，向他们致敬。”
languages.original_text: "It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."

traits.locale_text: “可惜不是所有指挥官都活了下来。但我们会将他们的名字铭刻下来，再唱一支歌，向他们致敬。”

languages.text: "Komutanlardan bazılarını kaybetmemiz çok üzücü. Fakat adlarını kazıyacak ve onurlarına şarkılar söyleyeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."

traits.locale_text: "Komutanlardan bazılarını kaybetmemiz çok üzücü. Fakat adlarını kazıyacak ve onurlarına şarkılar söyleyeceğiz."

languages.text: « Dommage que les commandants ne s'en soient pas tous sortis, mais nous consignerons leurs noms et chanterons en leur honneur. »
languages.original_text: "It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."

traits.locale_text: « Dommage que les commandants ne s'en soient pas tous sortis, mais nous consignerons leurs noms et chanterons en leur honneur. »

languages.text: «Es una lástima que no todos los comandantes hayan sobrevivido, pero grabaremos sus nombres y cantaremos una canción en su honor».
languages.original_text: "It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."

traits.locale_text: «Es una lástima que no todos los comandantes hayan sobrevivido, pero grabaremos sus nombres y cantaremos una canción en su honor».

languages.text: "Es ist eine Schande, dass es nicht alle Commander geschafft haben. Aber wir werden ihre Namen festhalten und zu ihren Ehren ein Lied singen."
languages.original_text: "It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist eine Schande, dass es nicht alle Commander geschafft haben. Aber wir werden ihre Namen festhalten und zu ihren Ehren ein Lied singen."

languages.text: 「司令官全員が生き残らなかったのは残念だが、彼らの名を記し、彼らを称える歌を歌おう。」
languages.original_text: "It's a shame not all the commanders made it. But we will scribe their names and sing a song in their honour."

traits.locale_text: 「司令官全員が生き残らなかったのは残念だが、彼らの名を記し、彼らを称える歌を歌おう。」
